item.title: Archaeologists find Queen Elisenda’s remains among 25 medieval skeletons, including individuals with...
item.description: Archaeologists find Queen Elisenda’s remains among 25 medieval skeletons, including individuals with unexplained stab wounds  Archaeology News Online MagazineSkeletal remains of Queen Elisenda, one of the most powerful rulers in medieval Europe, unearthed in Barcelona — along with several others who bore unexplained stab wounds  Live ScienceQueen Elisenda’s tomb among key discoveries in Pedralbes Investigation  HeritageDailyThe DNA reveals the silenced chronicle of Pedralbes  Diari ARAA queen’s tomb hid a secret for 700 years until science opened it  Diario AS

item.title: Russia’s $30m terror missile keeps missing - Euromaidan Press
item.description: Russia’s $30m terror missile keeps missing  Euromaidan PressRussian Oreshnik missile fired in January was nine years old, Ukrainian experts say  ReutersExclusive: Design of the Oreshnik Missile’s Submunitions Revealed  МілітарнийEuropean ambassadors shown foreign components from Russian missiles and drones used in 24 May attacks  Українська правдаOreshnik missile 'isn't cutting-edge' as Russia claims, Ukraine says after examining parts  The Kyiv Independent
